commands.review_summary:
The branch fast-answers selected Telegram final-button callbacks before the per-chat sequentializer, sends mapped visible acknowledgements after authorization/plugin routing, adds callback regression tests, and refreshes one raw-fetch allowlist line.

PR surface: Source +56, Tests +217, Other 0. Total +273 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source shows callback acknowledgement happens inside the callback handler after the per-chat sequentializer, and the PR adds a blocked-sequentializer regression test for the delayed-ack path.
